tool_args.label: Moody's Upgrades MTA TRB to A2

payload.description: Moody's Ratings upgraded to A2 from A3 the rating on MTA's $17.1 billion of outstanding Transportation Revenue Bonds (TRB), and revised the outlook to stable from positive

evidence_refs.source_quote: On June 13, 2025, Moody's Ratings upgraded to A2 from A3 the rating on the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, NY's (MTA) $17.1 billion of outstanding Transportation Revenue Bonds (TRB)

payload.description: MTA expects to issue Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority General Revenue Bonds, Series 2024A. Proceeds will provide $500 million of funding for approved bridge and tunnel capital projects and refinance outstanding TBTA General Revenue Bonds

evidence_refs.source_quote: In August 2025, MTA expects to issue Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority General Revenue Bonds, Series 2024A
